_comment: Committed connection config — env-var placeholders ONLY, never real tokens (tracked file). The server starts when HOSTINGER_API_TOKEN is set: on devices via the shell env, in claude.ai cloud environments via the environment's env vars; unset, it is skipped silently. Default binary is the full 127-tool hostinger-api-mcp; set HOSTINGER_MCP_BINARY to a category binary (hostinger-vps-mcp, hostinger-dns-mcp, ...) to keep the tool surface lean per SKILL.md. Multi-account setups keep using `claude mcp add -s user` per references/installation.md.
